name: TheListener
description: Network-layer MITM attack tool designed to intercept and reveal HTTP/HTTPS requests. Implements packet manipulation techniques for deep traffic visibility.

name: SAP
description: SOC Assessment Platform. An interactive web-based environment for training and evaluating Tier-1 SOC Analysts on incident response and log analysis workflows.

name: wh-mods
description: Custom Windows system modifications built for the Windhawk platform. Leverages C++ and API hooking for low-level OS customization and behavior tweaks.

name: HellCat
description: High-performance wrapper and automation utility for HashCat on Windows. Streamlines the password recovery and cryptographic auditing workflow.

name: KaliQuickFix
description: Automated system recovery script for Kali Linux. Resolves common apt dependency errors and package-management conflicts automatically.

name: Bundler
description: A universal link bundling and sharing utility. Designed for rapid resource packaging and efficient distribution of project assets.
